name: oriel
description: Oriel — the agent control surface for the shared Agent Board v2 (Workspace > Project > Epic > Story > Task). Registers the Agent Board MCP connector at the stable URL https://mcp.ori3l.com/abm (the Oriel gateway routes it to the v2 backend on Koyeb; backend swaps server-side so the install URL never changes), authenticated via Oriel web login, plus a single /oriel command — give it an idea or a subcommand (start/stop project · add epic · design · rethink design · analyze · questions · quick/detail/remaining report · where were we · continue · demo · walk · debug · fix · update board · tick · start/stop loop · check board) and the PD analyses it and loads live operating skills.
